title: cocculus flavicans
intro: Cocculus flavicans, also known as Anamur leaf or Woodland bitter apple, is a plant species native to Asia and is a type of vine. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cocculus flavicans include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
